'''kakïfbïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyssa|nyssa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyssa|nyssa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| kakïfbïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kækïfbïfth || kækïfbïfj || kækïfbïfsh || kækïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kakïfkïfbïfth || kakïfkïfbïfj || kakïfkïfbïfsh || kakïfkïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kakïfbïfth || kakïfbïfj || kakïfbïfsh || kakïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kakïffbïffth || kakïffbïffj || kakïffbïffsh || kakïffbïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kakïfbïfïf || kakïfbïfïf || kakïfbïfïf || kakïfbïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || kakïfbïfth || kakïfbïfj || kakïfbïfsh || kakïfbïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kakïfbïfïfl || kakïfbïfïfl || kakïfbïfïfl || kakïfbïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kakïfbïfïfïf || kakïfbïfïfïf || kakïfbïfïfïf || kakïfbïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || kakïfbïfïfn || kakïfbïfïfn || kakïfbïfïfn || kakïfbïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kakïfbïfïforo || kakïfbïfïforo || kakïfbïfïforo || kakïfbïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
